event.intent: Review and repair CC filesystem entity changes so file and directory examples pass graph validation, enter Earth admission through smart contracts, and carry accurate review memory.

enterprise_context.business_value: Keep TBOS development auditable, restartable, and connected to the current intent: Review and repair CC filesystem entity changes so file and directory examples pass graph validation, enter Earth admission through smart contracts, and carry accurate review memory.
